description_long: This object is a modern, multi-story urban building with a flat roof and a combination of geometric forms. The facade features a mix of yellow, white, and beige tones, with a prominent section of stone cladding and large, dark garage doors at street level. The structure includes a partially open upper terrace with wooden decking and glass railings, as well as a staircase leading to the upper floor. Windows are large and rectangular, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. The building is surrounded by a low perimeter wall and is designed to fit seamlessly into a dense urban environment.
description: A modern, multi-story urban building with a flat roof, stone and yellow facade, large garage doors, and an open terrace with glass railings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, stone cladding, yellow facade, garage doors, and open terrace with glass railings.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the building's depth, flat roof, and the upper terrace area partially visible behind the perimeter wall.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by plain white walls and minimal architectural features, with a glimpse of the terrace and interior spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the sloped roof section, terrace, and the building's layered structure.
attribute_topping_arrangement: No toppings are visible; the structure is solid and architectural with no food elements apparent.
